name: Spiced, Apple & Ginger
description: A simple highball cocktail blending BACARDÍ Spiced rum with apple juice, ginger ale, and optional bitters for a crisp seasonal drink. Keep seasonal celebrations simple with BACARDÍ Spiced rum, apple juice and ginger ale. The tang of BACARDÍ Spiced and ginger ale complements the sweetness of fresh apple juice.
recipe_steps: Fill a highball glass with ice.
Build all liquid ingredients into the glass, squeeze a wedge of lime and add Angostura bitters if desired.
Garnish with another lime wedge or an apple slice.
searchable_text: Spiced, Apple & Ginger main rum BACARDÍ Spiced rum A simple highball cocktail blending BACARDÍ Spiced rum with apple juice, ginger ale, and optional bitters for a crisp seasonal drink. Keep seasonal celebrations simple with BACARDÍ Spiced rum, apple juice and ginger ale. The tang of BACARDÍ Spiced and ginger ale complements the sweetness of fresh apple juice. ingredients 50 ml BACARDÍ Spiced rum, 50 ml apple juice, 50 ml ginger ale, 2 dashes Angostura® bitters (optional), 1 lime wedge(s) recipe steps Fill a highball glass with ice. Build all liquid ingredients into the glass, squeeze a wedge of lime and add Angostura bitters if desired. Stir to combine. Garnish with another lime wedge or an apple slice.
